'''Dragon troopers''' were [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] cavalry [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] who rode [[Katarn/Legends|Katarns]] and wielded [[Flamethrower/Legends|flamethrowers]]. These troopers were effective at attacking walls and buildings. Dragon troopers could trained at [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]] as long as an [[animal nursery]] was available to provide the mounts for the Wookiee soldiers to ride.

==History==
[[File:Wookiee_Mounted_Trooper2.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Dragon troopers]]
Dragon troopers were used during the [[Alaris Prime colonial war|war]] for the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Alaris Prime/Legends|Alaris Prime]],<ref name="GB" /> which was fought between [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]] and [[36 BBY/Legends|36 BBY]]<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> between the rightful [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Alaris Prime colonists|colonists]] and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]]. At one [[Unidentified Wookiee base (shipyard)|base]] where the Wookiee leader [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] was preparing troops to [[Attack on the Trade Federation outpost|attack]] a [[Trade Federation outpost]], two troop centers were built to train dragon troopers as well as [[bowcaster trooper]]s and [[Thermal detonator trooper (Wookiee)|grenade troopers]].<ref name="GB" /> A force of twelve Wookiees, including Chewbacca, boarded [[Transport Ship (Wookiee)|transport ships]] and crossed a [[Water/Legends|river]] to reach the outpost. The dragon and grenade troopers used their weaponry to bring down the light wall surrounding the oupost and the central troop center, while Chewbacca and the [[Bowcaster/Legends|bowcaster]] troopers brought down the [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-series battle droid]]s guarding the outpost.<ref name="Prima">[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

One dragon trooper was present in [[Chewbacca's camp]] when it was [[Attack on Chewbacca's camp|attacked]] by a Trade Federation strike force [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanded]] by [[LUH-989]]. Dragon troopers were also present in the [[Attack on the Trade Federation listening array|attack]] on a Trade Federation [[Trade Federation listening array|listening array]] and the [[Battle for Alaris Prime]], which saw the company expelled from Alaris Prime completely.<ref name="GB" /> One dragon trooper was present on [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Kashyyyk/Legends|Battle of Kashyyyk]], riding past the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] and [[Quinlan Vos/Legends|Quinlan Vos]] as they discussed the potential [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|death]] of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]] and the end of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="Hidden" /> Dragon troopers also fought in the [[Liberation of Kashyyyk/Legends|Liberation of Kashyyyk]] in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="GB" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dragon troopers appeared in the [[2001]] [[LucasArts]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' as the mounted trooper unit of the Wookiee civilization.<ref name="GB" /> An early design for the Wookiee mounted trooper had [[Bantha/Legends|banthas]] as the mounts, though ultimately katarns were chosen.<ref name="Lucas">''[[Rogue Leaders: The Story of LucasArts]]''</ref>
